{{Quote|I can tell by the smile on Pordy's face that he's already countin' the extra credits.|Ars Fivvle|<ref name="Bespin: Action Tidings">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040930bespinmain|text=Bespin: Action Tidings|int=Bespin: Action Tidings}}</ref>}}
'''Pordimer''', often referred to by the name '''Pordy''', was a thin, [[Color/Legends|brown]]-haired [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] that lived in the artificial [[City/Legends|city]] known as [[Ugnorgrad/Legends|Ugnorgrad]], one [[Meter/Legends|kilometer]] below [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Pordimer was employed as a cameraman working for [[Ars Fivvle]] on the news media program known as ''[[Action Tidings]]''. [[3 ABY/Legends|Three years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Pordy was present when former Cloud City [[Administrator/Legends|Administrator]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] returned to Bespin to destabilize the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] presence in Cloud City. Pordimer and the rest of the ''Action Tidings'' news crew went to Cloud City and witnessed [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]], Calrissian and [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] take control of the city away from Imperial [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hugo Treece]].<ref name="marvel57" />
